question_text_kw: Ikinyabiziga cyose cyangwa ibinyabiziga bigenda bigomba kugira:
option_c_kw: A na B ni ibisubizo by'ukuri
explanation_kw: Buri kinyabiziga kigomba kugira umuyobozi wacyo.

question_text_kw: Ijambo 'akayira' bivuga inzira nyabagendwa ifunganye yagenewe gusa:
option_c_kw: A na B ni ibisubizo by'ukuri
explanation_kw: Akayira ni inzira yagenewe abanyamaguru n'ibinyabiziga by'ibiziga bibiri.

question_text_kw: Umurongo uciyemo uduce umenyesha ahegereye umurongo ushobora kuzuzwa n'uturanga gukata tw'ibara ryera utwo turanga cyerekezo tumenyesha:
option_c_kw: Igabanurwa ry'umubare w'ibisate by'umuhanda mu cyerekezo bajyamo
explanation_kw: Umurongo ucagaguye werekana igabanurwa ry'ibisate by'umuhanda.
